title: senecio halimifolius
intro: Senecio halimifolius, also known as the tree groundsel, is a shrubby perennial herb in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio halimifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds, and promote wound healing. Senecio halimifolius can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
